title: ComponentDefinition
description: A component expressed as data: a name, default params, and a template of primitives. Clients register definitions and expand them; this is how a module contributes a component without shipping client code.

name.description: The node type this definition provides.

params.description: Default param values, overridden by the caller's props.

templateNode.description: A template node. Any prop value may be a literal or a binding — {"$bind":"path"} (dot paths allowed) or {"$match":{"on":…,"cases":{…},"default":…}}. Control keys inside props: $if / $ifNot (conditional render), $each + $as (repeat over an array). A node of type "Outlet" (optional prop "name") renders the caller's children or a named slot.
